# VibeCollab

> AI-powered project collaboration framework with three-mode CLI (IDE/interactive/agent)

## Overview

VibeCollab is a Python-based project collaboration framework that generates AI collaboration protocols, manages multi-developer workflows, and provides three-mode AI CLI integration (IDE dialogue, CLI human interaction, Agent autonomous).

## Key Features

- **Protocol Generation**: Generate `CONTRIBUTING_AI.md` from `project.yaml` configuration via PatternEngine (Jinja2 template-driven, manifest-controlled)
- **Template Overlay**: Per-project template customization via `.vibecollab/patterns/` (local-first, builtin-fallback)
- **Multi-Developer Workflow**: Developer context isolation, task management, event logging
- **Three-Mode AI CLI** (v0.5.8):
  - `vibecollab ai ask/chat`: Human-interactive CLI with project context injection
  - `vibecollab ai agent plan/run/serve/status`: Autonomous agent mode with safety gates
  - IDE dialogue: Reads CONTRIBUTING_AI.md for in-editor AI collaboration
- **Project Lifecycle**: Stage-based development (demo → production → scaling)
- **LLM Client**: Provider-agnostic (OpenAI-compatible + Anthropic Claude)

## Quick Start

See [AI Collaboration Guidelines](CONTRIBUTING_AI.md) for how to work with AI assistants on this project.

## AI Collaboration

- [AI Collaboration Guidelines](CONTRIBUTING_AI.md):
  Collaboration protocol, decision levels, task units, and workflow rules for AI-assisted development.
  This document defines how AI assistants should work with developers on this project.
